task_description: Enter building type; installation energized; distributor; meter; years; diagnostic scope; standard; and documents from client
Complete B1 checklist: presence; location; total cutoff; switch type; manual control; multipolar; height; access; panel access; not under water or cooktop (B1.3 a–j) with Oui; Non; NV; Sans Objet
Complete B2 checklist: RCD presence; sensitivity ≤30 mA; test button (B2.3.1 a; B11 a; B2.3.1 i) with Oui; Non; NV; Sans Objet
Complete B4 checklist: protection at origin; phase cutoff; fuse or breaker type; conductor grouping; rating vs section; overheating (B4.3 a1; h; etc.) with Oui; Non; NV; Sans Objet
Complete B3 checklist: earth electrode; resistance value in Ohm; ground conductor; LEP; outlets grounded; elevator grounding with Oui; Non; NV; Sans Objet
Complete B5–B10: bathroom bonding (B5); bathroom zone (B6); enclosure and insulation (B7); obsolete equipment (B8); common area feed (B9); pool and fountain (B10) with Oui; Non; NV; Sans Objet
E1: select uncovered type; validate; list; and building parts checkboxes (e.g. grounding in common areas; parts in common areas)
Enter unverifiable points under Constatations Diverses E2 sub-tab
Enter comments under Constatations Diverses Commentaires sub-tab
Enter parts powered from common areas under Constatations Diverses E3 sub-tab
View and confirm final overview and conclusions on Résumé tab
